summary: Final UI polish pass for CapyMatch verified. All 14 features tested successfully across Coach dashboard, Director mission control, and Support Pod. Key changes: (1) Contextual labels 'Across N at-risk schools' working, (2) Signal-specific language 'Follow-ups missed' replacing 'Momentum dropping', (3) Bullet lists with max 3 + '+N more' overflow, (4) CTAs use 'Fix overdue (N)' not 'Send follow-ups', (5) No forbidden text found, (6) 'Fix overdue actions' CTA in Support Pod attention section.
critical_code_review_comments: inbox-utils.js: getSecondaryContext returns 'Across N at-risk schools' for overdue follow-ups (line 202)
inbox-utils.js: getCompressedLine returns signal-specific 'Follow-ups missed', 'No recent replies' etc (lines 223-234)
inbox-utils.js: getContextualCta returns 'Fix overdue (N)' for overdue items (line 249)
CoachInbox.js: Top priority card shows bullet list with max 3 schools + '+N more' overflow (lines 166-177)
CoachInbox.js: Up Next rows use bullet format for schools (lines 243-255)
TopPriorityCard.js: Director card uses same bullet format and CTA pattern
InboxRow.js: Director inbox rows use bullet format for schools (lines 66-77)
StatusIntelligence.js: Uses 'Fix overdue actions' or 'Open tasks' CTA (line 157)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final UI polish pass verified. All 6 parts implemented: (1) Contextual labels like 'Across 3 at-risk schools', (2) Signal-specific momentum language 'Follow-ups missed' instead of 'Momentum dropping', (3) Bullet lists with max 3 + '+N more' overflow, (4) CTAs 'Fix overdue (N)' replacing 'Send follow-ups', (5) Tighter spacing between school list and CTA, (6) Consistency pass - no 'Resolve blocker', 'Review blocker', or 'View details' in attention sections.
